case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTO & CAS INS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS INS AL GRAF BAIL BOND

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS INS AL GRAF BAIL BOND $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00
